calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Charles Wayne Hemphill, Jr. or James K. Hemphill, a/k/a Ken Hemphill.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 18, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 16, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 7, 2009.
Notice of Stay of Proceedings with regards to defendant Toothpro Inc., aka/dba Toothpro, was filed on February 1, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Charles Wayne Hemphill, Jr., and James K. Hemphill, a/k/a Ken Hemphill as follows:

Damages/Principal - $111,312.33.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,974.08.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $725.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $120,511.41.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the equipment described in Attachment A of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
